name: syncspace
description: Offline-first real-time collaborative workspace built with React, Yjs, IndexedDB, WebSockets, and Node.js.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm.cmd run dev --workspace client" "npm.cmd run dev --workspace server"
scripts.build: npm.cmd run build --workspace client && npm.cmd run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm.cmd run typecheck --workspace client && npm.cmd run typecheck --workspace server
